prompt: Tap sb as the position anchor before acting.
why_v1: Position anchors keep order and pressure reads stable.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The small blind is the right seat anchor, so the read stays tied to the out-of-position blind that feels the pressure first.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Anchor the small blind first so the mixed read stays tied to the correct pressure position before you act.
